reviews.review_title: Here is why I should get the stick
reviews.review_description: First off I love the game so much. I love how you get free long arms, it helps me move around faster in the game. Another reason is because when people use apks or are being toxic or any bad stuff, I report them. Even if I’m not a moderator I still report them just in case a moderator or you/the owner will see it. Third reason is I play this game daily. I love how you go backwards in update. Like how lately you had the valentines update, and then the winter update, and now you have the thanksgiving update. I play this game more than real gorilla tag now. I’m not begging but it would be nice to give me stick. (I have discord so you can contact me)
